use_cases: Triggering actions or events when clicked
Toggling states or modes in UI controls
Providing accessible interactive elements with keyboard support
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-inspired button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe prop-based styling, supports asChild pattern via Radix Slot for composition, and includes full accessibility support with focus-visible rings and disabled states.
